name: waalaxy-copilot
description: The Waalaxy AI Copilot for Claude: website positioning teardown, website-to-targets, LinkedIn/Sales Nav search URLs, LinkedIn profile optimization, outreach sequences, and CSV list cleaning, with the Waalaxy MCP connector bundled for one-step install.

plugins.name: waalaxy-copilot
plugins.description: Skill + Waalaxy MCP connector bundle. Installing this plugin sets up the full prospecting workflow (website teardown -> targets -> search URL -> profile optimization -> sequence -> list cleaning -> Waalaxy import) and connects the Waalaxy account via MCP in one step.
